params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a synchronous full adder with an enable signal. When the enable signal (En) is high, the module computes the sum and carry-out outputs using standard full adder logic; specifically, it calculates the sum by XORing inputs A, B, and Cin, and generates the carry-out using a combination of AND and OR operations. However, when the enable signal is low, both the sum and carry-out outputs are set to one, effectively enabling the adder functionality.
